calendar.matters:
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Aug-31-2009 Off Calendar

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Jul-21-2009 Continued To Sep-11-09 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 212

Default Prove-Up Hearing.
Off Calendar Jul-28-2009 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled this day for Default Prove-Up Hearing.
Dept. 218, Comm. William R. Gargano, Clerk: Kevin Dougherty, CSR: Lois Jones, #3689.

Elizabeth MacDonald, Esq. appeared for plaintiff De Lage Landen Financial Services, Inc., a corporation.
No appearance by defendant Flagship Studios, Inc., a California corporation.
Default was entered against defendant on April 21, 2009.
Doe defendants were dismised on May 11, 2009.
Order waiving witness appearance at default prove-up hearing was filed on June 11, 2009.

After hearing the evidence presented, and good cause appearing, the Court rules in favor of Plaintiff De Lage Landen Financial Services, Inc., a corporation, and against the Defaulted Defendant Flagship Studios, Inc., a California corporation as follows:

Damages/Principal - $219,044.46.
Prejudgment Interest - $30,246.14.
Attorney's Fees - $2,825.00.
Costs - $576.00, for a total judgment in the amount of $252,691.60.

Judgment was submitted to and signed by the Court.

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar May-11-2009 Continued To Jul-31-09 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 212

PROOF OF SERVICE ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Mar-25-2009 Off Calendar
